Lawn Game Rentals Bridgewater NS

Nova Kingdom Rentals offers 12 lawn games available for rent across the South Shore and Nova Scotia. Games can be rented in packages of 5, 10, or all 12 — or added on to an inflatable rental.

12 Lawn Games

  • Cornhole: A classic toss game and crowd favourite for parties, BBQs, and casual competitions.
  • Giant Connect 4: Big, colourful, and perfect for friendly head-to-head fun.
  • Giant Jenga: Stack it high and keep your nerves steady with this oversized party classic.
  • Ladder Toss: Easy to learn and fun for all ages.
  • Ring Toss: A classic toss game that works great for kids and adults.
  • Badminton: A simple, active game perfect for casual outdoor play.
  • Tug of War: Team-vs-team fun that brings energy, laughs, and friendly competition to any event.
  • Bocce Ball: A relaxed yet strategic outdoor classic that works for all ages and group sizes.
  • Spikeball: Fast-paced team game that gets competitive quickly — great for teens and adults.
  • Giant Tic Tac Toe: The classic game scaled up for outdoor fun at any age.
  • Croquet: A timeless lawn game that adds a touch of classic fun to any outdoor event.
  • Birch Wood Washer Toss: A solid wood washer toss set with a satisfying skill element for players of all ages.

Lawn Game Packages

5 Lawn Games: $175. 10 Lawn Games: $250. All 12 Lawn Games (includes Cornhole): $280. Cornhole add-on available with 5 or 10 game selections for +$25.

Lawn games can be booked standalone or added to inflatable and package rentals.

Check availability and request a quote
